#  View Drawing Markups (iOS) 
##### Tip
A new [two and three-column layout](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-layouts-are-available-for-ipad) is now available for iPads, making it easier to navigate different tools. Tap the **menu** ![Icon Ipad Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2wyHOqBLAvCO7klaHLXZzj/5f9e5da4183e99ab1ef8a7ee2530d1b0/icon_ipad_menu.png?fm=webp&h=24) icon to show and hide the tools menu.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher to the Drawings tool.  
_Note:_ Users can view all published markups and their own personal markups. See [Publish Personal Drawing Markups (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups-ios).


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing that you want to view.
  4. View markups on the drawing using the following actions:
     * Zoom in and pan around the drawing to view markups.
     * Tap a markup to view its details.
     * Filter drawing markups to view certain types of markups. See [Filter Drawing Markups (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/filter-drawing-markups-ios).


## See Also
  * [Filter Drawing Markups (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/filter-drawing-markups-ios)
  * [Link a Correspondence Item on a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/link-a-correspondence-item-on-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Email Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/email-drawings-ios)
title: View Drawing Markups (iOS)
description: How to view drawing markups in the Drawings tool on the Procore iOS app.
